criteria.title: 3-layer Architecture
criteria.description: API, service, and repository responsibilities are separated. The demo uses an OpenAPI/runtime proxy; full proof requires static analysis.

criteria.title: Project Naming Convention
criteria.description: Projects and public API metadata follow the PRN232 naming convention. The demo checks the published API title.

criteria.title: DB Schema & Seed Data
criteria.description: The application starts with a usable schema and the expected seeded records.

criteria.title: 4 Model Types
criteria.description: The API exposes the required student, course, enrollment, and subject resources.

criteria.title: RESTful Endpoint Naming
criteria.description: Resource endpoints use noun-based REST paths.

criteria.title: GET by ID
criteria.description: A resource can be retrieved by its stable identifier.

criteria.title: List API Capabilities
criteria.description: List APIs support the required query and response-shaping behavior.

criteria.title: Pagination Metadata
criteria.description: Paged responses include usable page metadata and content.

criteria.title: Response Format & HTTP Status
criteria.description: Success and error responses use the documented envelope and HTTP status codes.

criteria.title: Docker Deployment
criteria.description: The application runs in the isolated Compose sandbox and serves a healthy endpoint.

criteria.title: Swagger/OpenAPI
criteria.description: A valid OpenAPI document is available at runtime.

criteria.title: Code Quality
criteria.description: Public operations are consistently documented. The demo is a runtime proxy; full proof requires static analysis.
